post.description:
Upload file (PDF, Images, Excel)

Args:
    file: The file to upload
    upload_dir: Target directory (contracts, invoices, receipts, settlements, expenses)
                If not provided, determined by file extension

Returns: {"filename": str, "path": str, "content_type": str}

schema.title: Response Upload File Api V1 Common Upload Post

get.description:
Get dashboard statistics with caching (5 minute TTL):
1. Cards Data (Total Contracts, Total Received, Total Paid, Expenses)
2. Bar Chart Data (Monthly Income vs Expense)
3. Pie Chart Data (Contract Categories)

Get summary statistics for contracts
If year/month provided, filter by sign_date
Get monthly income vs expense trend for a specific year
Get breakdown of expenses (Contract vs Non-Contract, and Categories)

Get AR/AP stats.
NOTE: AR/AP Outstanding is typically a snapshot (all time). 
However, "Received" and "Paid" should reflect the selected period.
"Receivable/Payable" in this context will represent 'New AR/AP generated in period'.
Export Non-Contract Expense Payments (无合同费用)

delete.description: Delete all audit logs before specified date (Admin only)

get.description: Backup database to SQL file and return it
Full system backup: Database + Uploaded files (ZIP)
Get options, optionally filtered by category

post.description:
Reset system to initial state.
WARNING: This will delete ALL data except superusers.
